name: worklog
description: Explicit Worklog tracking and reviewed project context for agent work.

interface.shortDescription: Turn sessions into reviewed project context.
interface.longDescription: Worklog captures local source events, stores user-approved templates for session logs and project logs, helps the assistant author reviewed project-log rollups, and generates concise resume context for future agent tasks. Shared projects keep drafts local and publish only approved artifacts.
defaultPrompt: Start Worklog setup for this project.
